rounds.label: First 75-idea pass
rounds.idea: Tempo Inbox: a productivity app that reads a user inbox, calendar, Slack, WhatsApp, and other work platforms; extracts what has to be done; builds a clean daily plan; keeps source proof and privacy guardrails; currently mock-backed with Supabase OAuth scaffolding and no pricing yet. Generate 75 practical improvements for the current AI prototype.

improvements.title: Personalized templates recommendation
improvements.why_it_helps: Feature depth increases usability, retention, and completion consistency.
improvements.how_to_apply: Implement templates flow with recommendation cards and one-click apply.

improvements.title: Personalized templates cross-device
improvements.why_it_helps: Feature depth increases usability, retention, and completion consistency.
improvements.how_to_apply: Implement templates flow with cross-device continuity and offline queue.

improvements.how_to_apply: Implement templates flow with event-driven notifications and snooze controls.

rounds.label: Second 75-idea pass
rounds.idea: Tempo Inbox after one improvement pass: improve it again with 75 additional practical product, UX, architecture, safety, testability, and integration improvements. Avoid pricing. Focus on what can be reflected in a high-quality AI prototype and future-ready scaffolding.
